narrative:
Prairie-K (precinct in Franklin County) has 465 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.4 percentage points.
